# FNONINJA (FNO Ninja)

> FNONINJA is a market analytics and data visualization platform for NSE F&O (Indian futures and options). It processes publicly available option chain data to produce interactive market maps, open-interest clusters, and derived support/resistance zone observations. Informational and educational only — not investment advice.

Also known as: FNO Ninja, F&O Ninja.

Not: NinjaTrader, a brokerage, a signal service, or FreedomBot.ai (crypto — separate product at https://freedombot.ai/).

## About

- [Homepage](https://fnoninja.com/): Product overview, features, pricing, and disclaimer
- [NSE F&O market map](https://fnoninja.com/levels): Interactive bubble map of the full F&O universe
- [Learn](https://fnoninja.com/learn): Educational guides to option-chain zones and market structure
- [Index History guide](https://fnoninja.com/learn/history): Six-month put/call walls, max pain, OI momentum (thickness), and dominance (glow)
- [Option zones science](https://fnoninja.com/learn/science): Put/call clusters, max pain, and expiry mechanics

## How it works

1. **Live data** — Real-time option chain data for NSE F&O stocks and indices during market hours.
2. **Analysis** — Algorithms identify open-interest clusters and derive support/resistance zone observations (not trading signals).
3. **Visualization** — Market maps, symbol dashboards, zone views, slideshow mode, and filters for independent research.

## Key features

- **Market map** — Entire NSE F&O universe in one interactive view
- **Symbol analytics** — Per-stock/index OI profiles and derived zone context
- **Zone dashboard** — Price positioning relative to option-derived zones
- **Slideshow mode** — Cycle through symbols for quick session scans
- **Community chat** — Subscriber-only moderated room for market-structure discussion (observations only)

## Audience

Indian F&O traders and researchers who want structured option-chain context across 200+ symbols and key indices (NIFTY, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY).
